app.title: Android App
app.description: Information about a published Android application

id.description: The unique identifier of the app

name.description: The human-readable name of the app

shortDescription.description: A brief overview of what the app does

category.description: The catalog classification category for the app

version.description: The current published version of the app

androidVersion.description: Minimum required Android operating system version

developerName.description: Name of the developer or publisher

developerEmail.description: Support email address for the app

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL of the developer

iconUrl.description: URL to the application's logo icon

bannerUrl.description: URL to the application's promotional landscape banner

screenshots.description: Array of URLs pointing to application screenshots

apkUrl.description: Direct download link to the published APK file

featured.description: Whether the app should be highlighted on the storefront

changelog.description: Log detailing recent changes, bug fixes, or new features

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp representing the last update date

category.title: App Category
category.description: The classification category for Android apps

id.description: Unique slug ID for the category

name.description: User-facing display name for the category

icon.description: Lucide icon string name used to render the category icon

/apps/{appId}.description: The central collection containing published applications

/categories/{categoryId}.description: The central list of app categories
